decision: Spike: text ripple — Jena text index over 823 notes in Fuseki

steps.action: Spike: text ripple — Jena text index over 823 notes in Fuseki
steps.notes: Spike complete. Jena text index deployed and verified. Assembler config with Lucene indexing on dcterms:title, jb:body, rdfs:label. Auto-backfill entrypoint on first boot. 219K triples searchable. Notes not yet in Fuseki (0 jb:Note triples) — sync needed before note search works. text:query returns results in ~1ms vs 50-200ms for FILTER(CONTAINS).

Spike accepted. Text index live — 219K triples, sub-ms queries. Music + Stories searchable. Notes gap: 0 jb:Note triples in Fuseki, sync needed. No app-side text:query wiring yet. Proved the concept, connects to #354 (promote Search).

Notes not yet in Fuseki (0 jb:Note triples) — sync needed before note search works. text:query returns results in ~1ms vs 50-200ms for FILTER(CONTAINS).

Step 2 completed: Review and verify #318 — Spike accepted. Text index live — 219K triples, sub-ms queries. Music + Stories searchable. Notes gap: 0 jb:Note triples in Fuseki, sync needed. No app-side text:query wiring yet. Proved the concept, connects to #354 (promote Search).
